languages.text: {n}Вы видите, как примкнувшие к Себериану люди нервно переглядываются и бледнеют. Себериан лишь стоит недвижимо, гордый и величественный в своем абсолютном спокойствии.{/n}
{n}You see Seberian's newfound followers exchange nervous glances and turn pale. Seberian himself stands motionless, proud and majestic in his absolute composure.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы видите, как примкнувшие к Себериану люди нервно переглядываются и бледнеют. Себериан лишь стоит недвижимо, гордый и величественный в своем абсолютном спокойствии.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You see Seberian's newfound followers exchange nervous glances and pale. Seberian himself stands motionless, proud and majestic in his absolute serenity.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你看见塞贝里安新招揽的追随者们紧张地交换眼神，脸色煞白。塞贝里安本人则纹丝不动，神态镇定自若，高傲而威严。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see Seberian's newfound followers exchange nervous glances and turn pale. Seberian himself stands motionless, proud and majestic in his absolute composure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你看见塞贝里安新招揽的追随者们紧张地交换眼神，脸色煞白。塞贝里安本人则纹丝不动，神态镇定自若，高傲而威严。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ves a los nuevos seguidores de Seberian intercambiar miradas y palidecer. El propio Seberian permanece inmóvil, orgulloso y majestuoso.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see Seberian's newfound followers exchange nervous glances and turn pale. Seberian himself stands motionless, proud and majestic in his absolute composure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ves a los nuevos seguidores de Seberian intercambiar miradas y palidecer. El propio Seberian permanece inmóvil, orgulloso y majestuoso.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous remarquez l'entourage de Seberian échanger des regards nerveux et leur teint virer à la craie. Seberian lui-même se tient parfaitement immobile. Fier et majestueux, il conserve un calme olympien.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see Seberian's newfound followers exchange nervous glances and turn pale. Seberian himself stands motionless, proud and majestic in his absolute composure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous remarquez l'entourage de Seberian échanger des regards nerveux et leur teint virer à la craie. Seberian lui-même se tient parfaitement immobile. Fier et majestueux, il conserve un calme olympien.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın yeni edindiği takipçilerinin gergin bakışlar atıp sarardığını görüyorsun. Seberian'ın kendisi ise mutlak soğukkanlılığıyla gururlu ve görkemli, hareketsiz duruyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see Seberian's newfound followers exchange nervous glances and turn pale. Seberian himself stands motionless, proud and majestic in his absolute composure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın yeni edindiği takipçilerinin gergin bakışlar atıp sarardığını görüyorsun. Seberian'ın kendisi ise mutlak soğukkanlılığıyla gururlu ve görkemli, hareketsiz duruyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du siehst, wie Seberians neu gefundene Gefolgsleute nervöse Blicke austauschen und erbleichen. Seberian selbst steht regungslos, stolz und majestätisch vor dir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see Seberian's newfound followers exchange nervous glances and turn pale. Seberian himself stands motionless, proud and majestic in his absolute composure.{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの新たな信者たちは、不安げな視線を交わし、顔色が悪くなっている。セベリアンのほうは、動じない。静けさの中に、誇りと威厳が宿っている。{/n}
